articles.title: Man found dead in Brockton was in fight, then run over, DA says
articles.description:
Lianes Brandao worked as a forklift driver and enjoyed playing soccer and spending time with friends, according to his obituary.

The post Man found dead in Brockton was in fight, then run over, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lianes Brandao, 30, was found dead in Brockton after a fight and being run over.
Brandao worked as a forklift driver and was known for his love of soccer.
The incident raises concerns about safety and violence in local communities.

articles.title: Pregnant, battling cancer — now she’s running the 2026 Boston Marathon
articles.description:
After a harrowing diagnosis during pregnancy, the New Hampshire mom is running to give back to the Ellie Fund that supported her family.

The post Pregnant, battling cancer — now she’s running the 2026 Boston Marathon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire mom Jennifer Capone-Haberek is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.
She was diagnosed with cancer during her pregnancy and received support from the Ellie Fund.
Her marathon run aims to raise awareness and funds for cancer support in the community.
